description: Voice Commands During Speech Mode — intercept spoken command keywords with 'press'/'command' prefix and dispatch as key events instead of typing them literally.

userStories.title: Create VoiceCommandParser with command lookup table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a module that determines whether new speech text contains a command or is plain dictation.
acceptanceCriteria: New file Sources/iGest/Speech/VoiceCommandParser.swift
Enum VoiceCommandResult with cases .command(GestureAction, wordCount: Int) and .text
Recognizes 'press' + keyword: up, down, left, right, delete, enter, tab, escape
Recognizes 'command' + key: tab, z, c, v, a (maps to Cmd+key)
All matching is case-insensitive
Parser checks the END of the new text portion (not full cumulative transcript)
swift build succeeds
userStories.notes: Key codes: kVK_DownArrow (125), kVK_UpArrow (126), kVK_LeftArrow (123), kVK_RightArrow (124), kVK_Delete (51), kVK_Return (36), kVK_Tab (48), kVK_Escape (53). Use existing GestureAction enum from InputDispatch.swift.

userStories.title: Integrate VoiceCommandParser into SpeechController
userStories.description: As a user, when I say 'press down' during speech mode, the down arrow key fires instead of typing 'press down'.
acceptanceCriteria: SpeechController.onResult passes new text through VoiceCommandParser before typing
If command detected: call InputDispatch.perform() with the mapped action
If command detected: do NOT type the command words
If no command: type text as before (existing behavior preserved)
lastTypedLength tracking correctly accounts for consumed command words
swift build succeeds
userStories.notes: SFSpeechRecognizer delivers cumulative text. Only inspect the delta: text.dropFirst(lastTypedLength). If command words are consumed, advance lastTypedLength past them without typing.

userStories.title: Handle partial recognition with disambiguation UI
userStories.description: As a user, when I say 'press' and the system isn't sure if a command follows, I see feedback in the Dynamic Island rather than the word being typed prematurely.
acceptanceCriteria: When 'press' or 'command' detected at end of new text, hold in buffer instead of typing
Dynamic Island shows disambiguation indicator (e.g. '⌨️ press ...?') while buffered
If next partial result completes a valid command within 0.5s, dispatch the action
If next partial result does NOT complete a command within 0.5s, type buffered word(s) as literal text
No visible delay for normal dictation that doesn't contain prefix words
swift build succeeds
userStories.notes: Use DispatchWorkItem for the 0.5s timeout, cancel it when a new partial arrives. SpeechEngine.onResult fires on background thread — timer must be on main thread.

userStories.title: Visual command feedback in Dynamic Island
userStories.description: As a user, I want brief visual confirmation when a voice command is recognized and executed.
acceptanceCriteria: When a voice command fires, gesture label briefly shows the command (e.g. '⌨️ ↓ Down Arrow') for 0.5s
Returns to '🎤 Listening...' after the flash
Normal dictation text display is unchanged
swift build succeeds
userStories.notes: Use the existing onLabelUpdate callback. Flash the command name then schedule revert via DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter.
